'''Charny''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Hoth's Brand]] in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]]. Located in the [[Teraab sector/Legends|Teraab sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], it was a terrestrial world.

It was named after the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Kiel Charny]].

{{Planet-stub}}
